title: CORE paper document header (ADR-105 D5/D7)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter header of a paper under .specs/papers/CORE-*.md. Authored by ADR-105. The prose body is unconstrained; this schema governs only the structured header block. Consumed via the `paper` artifact type's schema_ref by the .specs/ document-header validator (ADR-105 D6 hook 1). Both status AND doctrine_tier are required: the #627 drift was precisely a paper asserting one lifecycle state (Draft) while cited at a doctrinal tier it never declared — the two axes are made mandatory and orthogonal here.

supersedes.description: Paper id this supersedes, or null.
